title: The action of a compact Lie group on nilpotent Lie algebras of type {{n,2}}
abstract:
Abstract
               We classify finite-dimensional real nilpotent Lie algebras with 2-dimensional central commutator ideals admitting a Lie group of automorphisms isomorphic to 
                     
                        
                           
                              
                                 SO
                                 2
                              
                              ⁢
                              
                                 (
                                 ℝ
                                 )
                              
                           
                        
                        
                        ${{\mathrm{SO}}_{2}(\mathbb{R})}$
                     
                  . This is the first step to extend the class of nilpotent Lie algebras 
                     
                        
                           𝔥
                        
                        
                        ${{\mathfrak{h}}}$
                     
                   of type 
                     
                        
                           
                              {
                              n
                              ,
                              2
                              }
                           
                        
                        
                        ${\{n,2\}}$
                     
                   to solvable Lie algebras in which 
                     
                        
                           𝔥
                        
                        
                        ${{\mathfrak{h}}}$
                     
                   has codimension one.
